speakers.name: Synopsys Vision
speakers.title:
Build Trust in Software  •   Align people, process and tools across the  entire lifecycle  •   Secure all sources of software   –   custom,  open source and third - party  •   Unified and AI - driven policy, visibility  and prioritization  •   Cohesive, integrated platform for  managing risk and compliance  Complete Security Assurance  for All Software  •   Cloud transformation   -   rapid cloud adoption  and movement of dev workflows to the cloud  •   Software supply chain   –   ensure safe and  effective adoption of open source and 3rd  party software, minimize external threats  from software  •   DevOps   –   create velocity, rather than  impede it  Addressing All Customer  Demand Drivers
